summary: Commercial Package Policy bundling multiple commercial coverages (BOP, GL, Commercial Property, Crime) into a single policy. Complex multi-line product with shared rating entities and cross-coverage validation rules.

schemaEntities.description: Package line coordinator entity. Custom fields: PackageDiscount, MinimumPremiumOverride, BrokerFeeFlag, BundleScore, SICCode, NAICSCode, TIV_Total.

Multi-use commercial location. 12 custom fields: ConstructionClass, OccupancyType, ProtectionClass, SprinklerGrade, BurglarAlarmGrade, TIV_Location, FloodZone, WindPoolEligible, ValuationBasis, CoinsurancePercent, AgreedValueFlag, ReplacementCostInd.
142 cross-line validation rules. Key: BOP eligibility size limits, GL aggregate alignment with property TIV, crime limit to revenue ratio checks, package discount eligibility.
Coordinates multi-line rating order and package discount application. Non-standard rating sequence not directly supported in GW Cloud.
Crime coverage entity. Custom: EmployeeTheftLimit, ForgeryLimit, ComputerFraudLimit, FundsTransferLimit, MoneySecuritiesLimit, ERISABondFlag.

relationships.note: Package rating driven by location TIV and class -- 12 custom location fields involved
Multi-line rating coordinator has no direct GW Cloud equivalent
142 cross-line rules reference both property and GL custom fields
Crime sub-line linkage requires package coordination logic

migrationIssues.detail: CPPRatingCoordinator orchestrates cross-line rating order and package discounts. GW Cloud rates lines independently -- custom coordinator logic must be redesigned.
CPPLocation_CPP has 12 custom fields. GW Cloud Location supports partial equivalence. 5 fields (FloodZone, WindPoolEligible, ProtectionClass, BurglarAlarmGrade, CoinsurancePercent) need extension.
142 Gosu rules include 38 cross-line checks (GL aggregate vs TIV, BOP size limits, crime-to-revenue). GW Cloud validates lines in isolation -- phased rule migration required.
Multi-line package discount applied by CPPRatingCoordinator. GW Cloud discount framework supports single-line discounts only -- custom implementation needed.
BOP eligibility rules (building size, revenue, SIC code restrictions) coded in Gosu. GW Cloud BOP module supports configuration-driven eligibility -- mapping required.
9 custom TypeKeys for OccupancyType and ConstructionClass. GW Cloud has partial equivalence -- 4 require new extension TypeKeys.

cloudMapping.action: Direct mapping -- GW Cloud native field
GW Cloud enrichment API -- configuration required
Design multi-line rating coordinator in GW Cloud -- significant effort
38 cross-line rules require redesign for GW Cloud isolated line architecture
TypeKey mapping required -- field rename only
